text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is always a big event. The
entrants are chosen by popular vote, so the
lineup invariably ends up being a who's who of
the best racers of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this year, the atmosphere in the stands is a
little different.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is finally taking on senior-year
racers... I can't wait to see how she does!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Don't get your hopes up. Some of these racers are
almost finished with their careers. One of them's
gonna snag the win, I figure.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Still, she's the Emperor, right? She'll be top three
for sure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're back. How's the mood out there?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... Are they now? How flattering.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are on me. They hope that I will measure
up favorably against the seniors, as well as the
most talented of my contemporaries.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But still, I have yet to capture their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf came second in the fan vote,
losing out to a senior-year Umamusume, and it
seems to be weighing on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A simple poll cannot truly measure the people's
faith in me, of course, but the result does
symbolize my current standing quite aptly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Many believe that the seniors' experience
presents an obstacle that I cannot hope to
overcome.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Which means that they doubt my abilities. And
such doubts have only one remedy.
choice_data_list: Let's show them how strong you really are!
Let's show them how strong you really are!
